# Guides — <System>

> User-facing docs organized by **Diátaxis**: the four kinds serve different
> needs — keep them separate, don't blend a tutorial with reference. Each file
> under `06-guides/` picks one kind.

## Onboarding (start here)
- **Prerequisites:** _(tools, access)_
- **Get it running (steps):**
  1. _(clone / install — sourced command)_
  2. _(configure)_
  3. _(run — sourced command)_
- **Verify:** _(how you know it works)_

## Diátaxis map

| Kind | Answers | File |
|---|---|---|
| **Tutorial** | "teach me by doing" (learning-oriented) | `tutorials.md` |
| **How-to** | "help me do X" (task-oriented) | `how-to.md` |
| **Reference** | "tell me the facts" (information-oriented) | `../04-reference/*` |
| **Explanation** | "help me understand" (understanding-oriented) | `explanation.md` |

## How-to (task recipes)
### How to <task>
1. _(step — command/action)_
2. _(step)_
- **Result:** _(…)_

## Explanation (concepts)
_(Why the system is shaped this way; background, trade-offs. Link ADRs.)_
